## Summary

Describe the outcome of this change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure or platform
- [ ] Application
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Backup or recovery
- [ ] Maintenance

## Validation

List the checks performed and their results. Do not include credentials or
private data.

- [ ] `make validate` passes.
- [ ] Documentation matches the desired state.
- [ ] Secret and personal-data exposure has been checked.

## Operational impact

- Downtime:
- Data or storage changes:
- Security or network exposure:
- Monitoring changes:

## Rollback and recovery

Explain how to reverse the change and recover affected data or services.

## Related work

Link issues, ADRs, and roadmap items.
